# `SetCharsetAndScreenLocation`

**Systems:** C64, C128, MEGA65  
**Parameters:** `n,n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the location of the charset and screen. C64 only.
<code>
SetCharsetAndScreenLocation($2000,$3000); // charset located at $2000, screen at $3000
</code>
Value of the screen must be $X000, $X400,$X800 or $Xc00  where X can be 0-F


</div>
